description: Periodically scatter caltrops at your feet during combat. Enemies in the zone are slowed and take light damage over time.
tooltipTemplate: Scatter caltrops every {trap.placeInterval:1}s. Enemies in the zone ({trap.radius} radius) are slowed to {trap.slowMultiplier%} of their speed and take {trap.damagePerSecond:1} DPS for {trap.durationSeconds:1}s.

description: Periodically drop a burning pit at your feet during combat. Enemies in the pit take damage over time.
tooltipTemplate: Drop a fire pit every {trap.placeInterval:1}s. Enemies in the zone ({trap.radius} radius) take {trap.damagePerSecond:1} DPS for {trap.durationSeconds:1}s.

description: Periodically arm an explosive trap at your feet. The first enemy to step on it detonates a damaging blast.
tooltipTemplate: Arm an explosive trap every {trap.placeInterval:1}s (lasts {trap.durationSeconds:1}s). Trigger radius {trap.triggerRadius}, blast radius {trap.radius}. Deals {trap.burstDamage} burst damage.

description: Periodically place a marker zone at your feet. Enemies entering the zone are marked, taking bonus damage from all sources for several seconds.
tooltipTemplate: Place a marker zone every {trap.placeInterval:1}s ({trap.radius} radius, lasts {trap.durationSeconds:1}s). Marked enemies take {trap.markMultiplier%} bonus damage from all sources for {trap.markDuration:1}s.
